summary: Training EXP for creating, editing, updating, and visually validating Excel project management Gantt charts.

context.task_family: Excel project management and Gantt chart work
output_focus: Gantt chart task bars built from cells

scope_limits: This EXP is not stable yet.
The first run proves exact duplication by file copy and PDF visual parity only.
Do not mark stable until the agent can create or update the Gantt chart structure, then pass visual QA.
